progressSummaryChip.desc: Label on the small chip/button in the Progress header that opens the weekly care summary.

progressMilestoneReached.desc: Eyebrow label above the live counter when the current day count exactly matches a milestone.

progressCurrentJourney.desc: Eyebrow label above the live sober-time counter when not currently at a milestone.

progressMilestonePrefix.desc: Title showing the milestone the user is currently on. {label} is a milestone name like 'One Week'.

progressNextPrefix.desc: Title showing the next milestone to reach. {label} is a milestone name like 'One Month'.

progressDaysLabel.desc: Fallback milestone label used when no named milestone exists for a given day count. Capitalized 'Days'.

progressPercentComplete.desc: Percentage-complete text shown next to the milestone progress bar.

progressThresholdCrossed.desc: Encouraging caption under the progress bar when the user is exactly at a milestone.

progressDaysOfTarget.desc: Progress caption showing current days out of the next-milestone target, e.g. '5 / 7 days'.

progressMilestonesTitle.desc: Section title for the milestone achievement grid.

progressCardsLink.desc: Tappable link in the Milestones section header that opens the shareable milestone cards screen.

progressGridYear.desc: Compact label inside a milestone grid cell for the one-year (365-day) milestone.

progressGridMonths.desc: Compact label inside a milestone grid cell showing months, e.g. '2mo'.

progressGridDays.desc: Compact label inside a milestone grid cell showing days, e.g. '7d'.

progressUnitDays.desc: Uppercase unit label under the days digits in the live sober-time counter.

progressUnitHrs.desc: Uppercase unit label under the hours digits in the live sober-time counter.

progressUnitMin.desc: Uppercase unit label under the minutes digits in the live sober-time counter.

progressUnitSec.desc: Uppercase unit label under the seconds digits in the live sober-time counter.

progressInsightCravingTitle.desc: Title of the cravings insight chart card on the Insights tab.

progressInsightCravingSubtitle.en: Every log is a brave step toward healing.
progressInsightCravingSubtitle.desc: Subtitle of the cravings insight chart card.

progressInsightCravingQuote.en:
Logging a craving is a sign of strength.
You're choosing awareness and support.
progressInsightCravingQuote.desc: Motivational quote shown at the bottom of the cravings insight card. Contains a line break.

progressInsightSleepTitle.desc: Title of the sleep insight chart card on the Insights tab.

progressInsightSleepSubtitle.en: Hours logged per night, tracked daily.
progressInsightSleepSubtitle.desc: Subtitle of the sleep insight chart card.

progressInsightSleepQuote.en:
Rest is part of recovery.
Every hour of sleep supports your healing.
progressInsightSleepQuote.desc: Motivational quote shown at the bottom of the sleep insight card. Contains a line break.

progressInsightMovementTitle.desc: Title of the physical-activity insight chart card on the Insights tab.

progressInsightMovementSubtitle.en: Active minutes per day, two weeks out.
progressInsightMovementSubtitle.desc: Subtitle of the movement insight chart card.

progressInsightMovementQuote.en:
Movement lifts the spirit.
Every active minute counts.
progressInsightMovementQuote.desc: Motivational quote shown at the bottom of the movement insight card. Contains a line break.

progressInsightThoughtsTitle.desc: Title of the thoughts insight chart card on the Insights tab.

progressInsightThoughtsSubtitle.en: Thoughts logged each day across 14 days.
progressInsightThoughtsSubtitle.desc: Subtitle of the thoughts insight chart card.

progressInsightThoughtsQuote.en:
Reflection builds resilience.
Your thoughts are your inner compass.
progressInsightThoughtsQuote.desc: Motivational quote shown at the bottom of the thoughts insight card. Contains a line break.

progressYLabelLogs.desc: Y-axis unit caption for insight charts that count log entries.

progressYLabelHrs.desc: Y-axis unit caption for the sleep insight chart (hours).

progressYLabelMin.desc: Y-axis unit caption for the movement insight chart (minutes).

progressInsightTitle14Days.desc: Header of each insight card combining its title with a fixed '14 days' window suffix, e.g. 'Sleep Quality — 14 days'.

progressThisWeek.desc: Column label for the current week's value in an insight card summary.

progressLastWeek.desc: Column label for the previous week's value in an insight card summary.

progressTenderHoursTitle.desc: Title of the risk-window card highlighting the time of day when the user logs most cravings.

progressTenderHoursBody.en: {count} of your {total} logged cravings land in this window. Knowing your pattern is power — plan something gentle for those hours: a walk, a call, the urge timer.
progressTenderHoursBody.desc: Body text of the risk-window card. {count} of {total} cravings fall in the user's highest-risk time window.

progressReviewMyPlan.desc: Button on the risk-window card that opens the pre-craving plan.

progressShowHeatmap.desc: Placeholder button text shown in place of the cravings heatmap card after the user has hidden it; tapping re-enables the card.

progressCravingsHeatmapTitle.desc: Header of the inline 28-day cravings heatmap card.

progressViewFull.desc: Link in the cravings heatmap card header that opens the full heatmap screen.

progressHeatmapCaption.en: Day 1 = your first day in the app. Only cravings logged from the Home screen count.
progressHeatmapCaption.desc: Explanatory caption under the cravings heatmap header.

progressHeatmapWeekLabel.desc: Row label in the cravings heatmap grid, abbreviated 'Week N'.

progressHeatmapLegendFewer.desc: Left-side legend label on the cravings heatmap color scale (fewer cravings).

progressHeatmapLegendMore.desc: Right-side legend label on the cravings heatmap color scale (more cravings).

progressRecoveryCapitalTitle.desc: Title of the weekly recovery-capital card on the Insights tab (used in both empty and filled states).

progressRecoveryCapitalEmptySubtitle.en: A 30-second check across five things that protect recovery.
progressRecoveryCapitalEmptySubtitle.desc: Subtitle shown on the recovery-capital card when the user hasn't filled in this week's check.

progressCapitalScore.desc: Score badge on the filled recovery-capital card, e.g. '4 of 5' dimensions ticked.

progressTapToEdit.desc: Hint at the bottom of the filled recovery-capital card indicating it can be tapped to edit.

progressDayLetterMon.desc: Single-letter abbreviation for Monday on the insight chart's x-axis.

progressDayLetterTue.desc: Single-letter abbreviation for Tuesday on the insight chart's x-axis.

progressDayLetterWed.desc: Single-letter abbreviation for Wednesday on the insight chart's x-axis.

progressDayLetterThu.desc: Single-letter abbreviation for Thursday on the insight chart's x-axis.

progressDayLetterFri.desc: Single-letter abbreviation for Friday on the insight chart's x-axis.

progressDayLetterSat.desc: Single-letter abbreviation for Saturday on the insight chart's x-axis.

progressDayLetterSun.desc: Single-letter abbreviation for Sunday on the insight chart's x-axis.
